content.content: Chilean-Canadian actress who rose to fame for her guest roles on notable series such asDegrassi: The Next Generation,Fringe, andHeartland. From 2013 to 2014, she was featured in a starring role for ABC's short-lived drama series Lucky 7. Her film credits include Traitor,2012, andMiss Sloane. She studied ballet and flamenco in her youth. She was a dialog translator for the 1997 sports drama film Historias de Fútbol. She provided additional music research for the 2002 family drama film Saint Monica. She posts photos from her daily life on her alexcastlemaker Instagram page. She posted a tribute photo toSinead O'Connorafter the singer's death in 2023. She has a daughter named Serena. Summer Bishilwas her co-star on Lucky 7.
